required_inputs: controlling lock doc or support mapping refs
required_outputs: controlling refs named in worker baton or checkpoint note
success_predicate: worker is grounded on the exact slice and exact starter bundle surfaces
forbidden_shortcuts: starting doc edits before controlling refs are named
inventing extra starter docs not selected by the family pattern
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit blocker and wait for orchestrator repair guidance

required_outputs: slice-level starter mapping doc when the family pattern requires it
success_predicate: all required starter docs exist in the assigned branch worktree
forbidden_shortcuts: claiming starter completion while any required doc is missing
editing outside assigned family starter surfaces

required_outputs: preserved first-draft evidence copy for every required starter doc
success_predicate: the pre-review starter state can be reconstructed independently of later edits
forbidden_shortcuts: sending the bundle to review without first-draft evidence copies

required_outputs: truthful local validation note in worker baton
success_predicate: the worker has run the selected starter validation lane and recorded the result truthfully
required_checks: docs-only starter gate selected for the current slice, typically make arc-start-check ARC=<n>
forbidden_shortcuts: claiming starter validation passed when the gate failed
omitting a known operational quirk that materially affects the gate result
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit exact gate failure and wait

required_outputs: starter worker baton naming produced artifacts, checks run, blockers, and next allowed action
success_predicate: the orchestrator can inspect the starter state without interpretive recovery
forbidden_shortcuts: claiming starter completion without a baton
steps.escalate_if_fail: stay on this step until the baton exists
